# Marigold

> Google Docs for AI-generated webpages: agents publish self-contained
> interactive HTML docs, humans comment inline on the rendered page, agents
> read the feedback and revise.

## API

- [HTTP API reference for agents](/agents.md): create a doc with zero auth via
  POST /api/quick; read/write with the URL-carried key; claim into an account
  to keep it. MCP server (full product, OAuth) at /api/mcp.
